description: Cheems (CHEEMS) emerged in 2024 on BNB Smart Chain as a dog-themed memecoin powered by iconic Shiba Inu imagery, viral meme culture, and strong retail momentum. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 CHEEMS gives original holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Cheems
